I’m looking for a top freelancer—Top Rated—to design and format a book structured as follows: half of the book is text/general knowledge, and the other half consists of quotes.
Basic book specs
• Working file: Word document
• Final delivery: fully formatted InDesign book
• Trim size: 5.25 × 8 inches
• Length: approx. 400 pages with five images
• Paper: cream paper
• Printing: black
Design style
Modern, elegant, and rather minimalist—clean, clearly structured, and highly readable.
Scope
Everything must be designed and formatted: page numbers, headers, bullets/lists, body text, headings, table of contents, etc.
However, we start with the central “hook” of the book: the quote page, where the quote is paired with its context. This quote page must be designed first, and we will derive the entire book design from it.
Project scope
This offer applies to one book only (the proof copy). After that, I will be looking for a freelancer to format my entire series in the same design: 45 books in German and 45 in English, each as paperback and hardcover, plus one eBook version for German and one for English. That would be a separate order.
Expectations
• Daily updates
• Reliability is mandatory
• High creativity and strong design skills
If you’re suitable and a top freelancer, please message me. I will then send you three files (two screenshots):
1. A screenshot showing the page where you can find the quote and its context.
2. The screenshot is meant to show how the page can be composed—how the quote and the context can be positioned in relation to each other. But you can also do it in a completely different way. I’ll leave that to you.
3. The Word file you’ll work with.

We design the quote page first, and the design of the entire book is derived from that.

To be absolutely clear: it is necessary to create a sample first—the quote page. This sample will not be paid upfront; I will not pay for something I cannot use. Once we have a suitable sample, the full project will be started and the sample will be included and paid as part of that order. description:
Build a commercial Microsoft Excel add-in named MYAPP that provides a generic interface between Microsoft Excel and a Python backend.

The purpose of the project is to create a reusable platform that allows predefined Excel worksheet functions to execute arbitrary Python code without requiring the user to install Python or perform any technical configuration.

The Excel add-in must act as a lightweight client. It should collect function arguments from Excel, send them to a Python backend via HTTPS, receive the response, and display the result in the worksheet.

The Python backend is responsible for all business logic.

The backend should be able to execute any Python code required by the application, including calculations, database queries, integrations with external systems, document generation, AI services, email sending, and other business processes.

Ich betreibe einen Online-Kurs zum Thema Affiliate-Marketing und möchte ein kompaktes Workshop-Video für YouTube produzieren. In dem Clip soll ein kleiner, aber wertvoller Ausschnitt aus dem Kurs – die Grundlagen des Affiliate-Marketings – Schritt für Schritt gezeigt werden, damit Zuschauer unmittelbar Nutzen ziehen und anschließend Interesse am vollständigen Kurs entwickeln.

So könnten sie kostenlos verstehen, wo gerade der Fehler liegt, warum aus Posts keine Anfragen entstehen und wie man genau da ansetzt. 

Das würde den Einstieg viel greifbarer machen und wahrscheinlich auch mehr Vertrauen aufbauen.

Was ich benötige:
• Skript oder Ablaufplan, der den Lerneinstieg klar strukturiert 
• Screen Recording mit professionellem deutschsprachigem Voice-over (kein Animations- oder Live-Action-Stil) 
• Dezente Intro-/Outro-Einblendungen, die zum Kurs verlinken 
• Saubere Nachbearbeitung (Tonangleichung, Cuts, einfache Grafikeinblendungen) 
• Fertige Datei in gängigem YouTube-Format, inklusive aller verwendeten Rohdateien

Wichtig ist mir dein nachweisbares Erfahrung sprofil in ähnlichen Projekten zeig mir gern Beispiele, bei denen du Wissen über Bildschirmaufnahmen vermittelt hast. Wenn dir Funnel-Logik, Call-to-Action-Platzierung und YouTube-SEO vertraut sind, erwähne das bitte ebenfalls.

Ich freue mich auf deine Idee, wie wir den Mehrwert prägnant und überzeugend verpacken!

BITTE NUR AUS DEUTSCHLAND

description:
Project Type: Customization of an existing 3D printable model
Objective: Create a personalized, romantic version of the original Alchemist's Cube Puzzle Combination Box while preserving the original puzzle mechanics and printability.

1. Project Overview

The objective is to customize the existing Alchemist's Cube Puzzle Combination Box available on Printables:

https://www.printables.com/model/1088843-alchemists-cube-puzzle-combination-box

This project is not intended to redesign the outside of the puzzle. The original mechanism, assembly process and user experience should remain intact wherever possible. The modifications focus on personalization, aesthetics and increasing the puzzle complexity through additional false keypaths.

2. Project Objectives

The customization consists of the following major tasks:

+ Understand the existing model and puzzle mechanism.
A) Create four customized outer combination wheels.
B) Personalize the top decoration.
C) Redesign decorative elements with a romantic theme.
D) Increase puzzle difficulty by introducing additional false keypaths.

Final Milestones below-
The Project must be completed by the 18.7.26

3. Familiarization with the Existing Model

Before beginning the customization, please study the original model and understand its assembly and mechanical operation.

The available files include:

Base
Core
Body
Inner_Wheel
Inner_Wheel_New
Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway
Outer_Blank_Symbol_Wheel_New
Outer_Symbol_Wheel_New
Outer_Dial_Wheel
Side_Wall_Decoration
Core_Decoration
Top_Decoration
Top_Trim_With_Arrows
Top_Trim_Smooth
Edge_Trim
Money_Box_Core (reference only)
Money_Box_Decoration (reference only)

Please ensure you understand:

overall puzzle operation
wheel interaction
locking mechanism
assembly sequence
relationship between decorative and mechanical parts
which parts may safely be modified

Unless explicitly specified below, the original puzzle mechanics should remain unchanged.

4. Task A – Custom Combination Wheels
Base Model

Use the existing

Outer_Blank_Symbol_Wheel_New.stl

as the base model for all four customized wheels.

The dimensions, tolerances, clearances and all mechanical interfaces shall remain identical to the original part.

Wheel Layout
Wheel 1
Position	Text
1	B
2	A
3	K
4	M
5	P
6	H
7	F
8	G
Wheel 2
Position	Text
1	E
2	A
3	U
4	I
5	H
6	L
7	IN
8	O
Wheel 3
Position	Text
1	L
2	N
3	S
4	M
5	P
6	R
7	A
8	U
Wheel 4
Position	Text
1	IE
2	J
3	MAR
4	D
5	A
6	Z
7	S
8	SE
Letter Orientation

Every letter or letter group shall be centered within its segment.

The lettering shall be oriented so that it appears upright when viewed from outside while the puzzle box is standing upright.

--> The bottom of every letter shall point toward the center of the wheel.

Example:

When the character A is viewed from the front, the base of the A points toward the wheel center.

Since the wheels are assembled after printing, I will configure the final solution during assembly. Therefore, the wheel files only need to preserve the specified letter order and orientation.

Font

Preferred font:

Bookman Old Style

If this font cannot be reproduced reliably in CAD, a visually similar serif font may be used after approval.

Printability Requirements

The lettering shall be optimized for FDM printing using a 0.4 mm nozzle.

Recommended design limits:

engraved depth ≥ 0.8 mm
minimum stroke width ≥ 0.6 mm
minimum feature width ≥ 0.8 mm
minimum spacing between strokes ≥ 0.5 mm

Minor adjustments to individual letters are acceptable if required for reliable printing.

5. Task B – Top Decoration (Core_Decoration)

Modify the existing Core_Decoration.stl with a personalized version.

The overall geometry shall remain circular and maintain the original external dimensions and mechanical interfaces so it fits the existing assembly without modification.

Within this circular element, create a large three-dimensional heart.

The heart should:

be smoothly integrated into the circular design,
occupy as much of the available area as practical,
appear elegant and premium,
become the dominant visual feature.

The following text shall be engraved into the heart:

ANJA & MARKUS

Requirements:

centered
balanced layout
elegant appearance
clearly readable
optimized for FDM printing

The heart should appear integrated into the overall circular ornament rather than simply placed on top of it.

The overall appearance should be timeless, elegant simple and suitable as a high-quality personalized gift.

6. Task C – Decorative Theme

Replace selected alchemical or mystical decorative elements with a romantic interpretation.

Possible design elements include:

hearts
intertwined lines
vines
leaves
roses
infinity symbols
subtle floral ornaments

These examples are intentionally provided as inspiration rather than strict requirements.

The artistic interpretation is part of the designer's creative contribution.

The finished appearance should remain:

elegant
tasteful
sophisticated
premium
suitable for adults

Avoid:

cartoon hearts
childish decorations
excessive Valentine's clichés
overly ornate Victorian styling

The puzzle should still primarily appear as an elegant mysterious puzzle box with subtle romantic elements.

7. Task D – Additional False Keypaths

Increase the puzzle complexity.

Use the existing

Inner_Wheel_New.stl

as the starting point and see how false keyways look like in Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway.stl (Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway.stl has the false connector)

MAKE SURE THE CONNECTOR MATCHES THE 8 SIDED Outer WHEEL Slot 


Requirements:

preserve one correct keypath
add four additional false keypaths
total:
1 true keypath
4 false keypaths

False keypaths should:

initially feel plausible
allow limited movement
stop before the puzzle opens
not permanently jam
not damage the mechanism
preserve the reliability of the puzzle
8. Design Freedom

The mechanical modifications described in this specification should be implemented precisely.

For the decorative redesign, however, the designer is encouraged to contribute creatively.

The listed decorative elements should be considered inspiration rather than exact templates.

Creative freedom is encouraged provided:

the romantic theme is preserved,
the design remains elegant,
printability is maintained,
mechanical functionality is unchanged,
personalization requirements are fulfilled.

Before final modeling, please provide one or two rendered design concepts for approval.

9. Printing Requirements

The finished parts shall be suitable for FDM printing.

Target assumptions:

PLA
0.4 mm nozzle
0.2 mm layer height

Avoid unnecessarily fine details that may reduce print quality.

10. Deliverables

Please provide:

Printable Files
STL files for all modified components
3MF project files (preferred if available)
Editable CAD Files

Preferred:

Fusion 360 (.f3d)

Alternative:

STEP
FreeCAD source files
Documentation
assembly notes (if modifications affect assembly)
recommended print orientation
recommended print settings

12. Acceptance Criteria
Mechanical
Puzzle assembles without modification.
All parts fit correctly.
Wheels rotate smoothly.
Original puzzle functionality is preserved.
Correct combination can be configured during assembly.
Exactly one functional keypath exists.
Four false keypaths function correctly.
False keypaths cannot accidentally open the puzzle.
False keypaths do not jam or permanently lock the mechanism.
Printability
All STL files are manifold.
All STL files slice successfully without repair.
Parts are optimized for FDM printing using a 0.4 mm nozzle.
Decorative details print reliably.
Engraved lettering remains clearly legible after printing.
Personalization
Wheel lettering exactly matches the supplied specification.
Letter orientation follows the specified upright alignment.
The top decoration contains the engraved text "ANJA & MARKUS".
The heart is integrated into the circular top decoration.
Decorative redesign follows the agreed romantic style.
The overall appearance is elegant and visually consistent.
Deliverables

13. Out of Scope

Unless separately agreed, this project does not include:
redesigning the core puzzle mechanics beyond the specified false keypaths,
creating additional puzzle variants,
optimizing specifically for resin printing,
creating multi-material or multi-color versions,
physical test printing or assembly by the designer,
modifications to parts not listed in this specification.

Milestone	Deliverables	Payment
1. Design Proposal & Concept Approval	
Review of the original model, confirmation of technical feasibility, implementation plan, identification of the files to be modified, and one or two rendered design concepts for the personalized top decoration and decorative theme.	10%
2. Mechanical Modifications	
Printable STL files and editable CAD files for the four customized wheels and the modified Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway containing 1 true and 4 false keypaths. Preliminary renderings demonstrating the modified parts.	35%
3. Decorative Modifications	
Printable STL files and editable CAD files for the personalized Core_Decoration and all modified decorative components. High-quality rendered preview images of the completed decorative parts.	35%
4. Final Delivery Package	
Final STL files, editable CAD files (Fusion 360 preferred, STEP acceptable), optional 3MF files, organized project files, assembly notes (if required), recommended print settings, and incorporation of all agreed review comments from the previous milestones.	20%

Mein Blog Entwicklungsspirale.de liegt bereits auf einem frisch eingerichteten Alfahosting-Server und wartet auf einen Neuanfang. Inhaltlich bewege ich mich im Feld der Integralen Theorie nach Ken Wilber sowie Spiral Dynamics, künftig mit einem klaren Fokus auf kommunale Anwendungen und einem offenen Blick auf weltweite Entwicklungen. 

Dafür suche ich professionelle Unterstützung bei der kompletten Neugestaltung der WordPress-Seite auf Basis des bisherigen Brandings (siehe Archivansicht: https://web.archive.org/web/20260000000000*/entwicklungsspirale.de). • Kommentarfunktion und Newsletter-Anmeldung sauber integriert (gerne mit DSGVO-konformen Tools wie MailPoet, Mailchimp o. Ä.)

• Vorbereitung auf spätere Erweiterungen wie Crowdfunding-Module und mehrsprachige Inhalte

description:
# Kadence and Gutenberg Expert for Multilingual Corporate Website Framework

We are looking for an experienced WordPress developer and web designer to create the technical, structural and visual framework for a new version of our corporate website:

https://www.seil-frey.com

Seil-Frey GmbH is a German manufacturer of ropes, nets and technical safety solutions.

The goal is not to copy the existing website, but to create a modern, fast, responsive and maintainable WordPress foundation that preserves the recognizable Seil-Frey identity while improving design, structure, performance and usability.

## Main project scope

The freelancer will create the complete technical and design framework, including:

* WordPress and Kadence setup
* Kadence Child Theme
* global colors, typography and spacing
* clean CSS architecture
* reusable Gutenberg patterns
* selected Kadence Blocks where useful
* responsive navigation, header and footer
* hero sections
* galleries
* image-and-text sections
* tables
* buttons
* contact and download sections
* multilingual infrastructure
* Yoast SEO setup
* performance optimization
* documentation and handover

The freelancer is not expected to enter and format all final website content.

After the framework is completed, the website will be handed over to another person who will add, structure and translate most of the content.

The system must therefore be easy to understand and maintain without programming knowledge.

## Existing website

The current website should be used as the basis for:

* corporate identity and color concept
* navigation structure
* page types
* representative content
* existing URLs and SEO structure

The freelancer should analyze the website and propose a clearer and more modern structure.

Enough representative content should be transferred to create complete sample pages and reusable templates. The remaining content will later be entered by the content editor.

Please quote separately for:

1. creation of the complete framework and sample pages
2. optional transfer of additional existing content

## Technical approach

The website should be built with:

* WordPress Gutenberg
* Kadence Theme
* Kadence Child Theme
* native WordPress blocks
* reusable Gutenberg patterns
* carefully selected Kadence Blocks
* centralized CSS classes
* global design settings

We do not want:

* Elementor
* Divi
* WPBakery
* proprietary page builders
* excessive plugin usage
* excessive inline CSS
* duplicated styles
* unnecessarily complex page structures

Kadence Blocks should be used sparingly and only where they provide a clear benefit.

## Code and CSS quality

Code quality is a central requirement.

The website must include:

* clean semantic HTML
* maintainable CSS
* clearly named CSS classes
* reusable global styles
* minimal inline styling
* minimal CSS duplication
* no unnecessary JavaScript
* no unused libraries
* no excessive DOM nesting
* clean child-theme structure
* fully responsive layouts

The most important styles should be implemented through reusable CSS classes or global WordPress/Kadence settings, including:

* headings
* paragraphs
* links
* buttons
* colors
* typography
* spacing
* containers
* columns
* images
* galleries
* tables
* forms
* mobile behavior

The CSS structure and naming system must be documented.

## Design requirements

The design should be:

* modern
* clear
* professional
* technical
* visually calm
* suitable for an industrial company
* easy to navigate
* fully responsive

The color concept should be based on the existing Seil-Frey website.

## Reusable components

The freelancer should create reusable blocks, patterns or templates for:

* desktop and mobile navigation
* header and footer
* hero section
* page introduction
* image gallery
* text with image
* image with text
* product and service sections
* technical information sections
* responsive tables
* call-to-action sections
* contact sections
* download sections
* buttons
* content columns
* references or project sections

These elements must be reusable without copying complex structures or writing new custom code.

## Responsive design

All elements must work correctly on desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile.

Navigation, galleries, tables, columns, images, buttons and text sections must be adapted intelligently for smaller screens.

## Performance

The website must be optimized for speed and good Core Web Vitals.

This includes:

* optimized images
* modern image formats where suitable
* responsive images
* lazy loading
* reduced CSS and JavaScript
* minimal plugin usage
* locally hosted fonts
* no unnecessary external scripts
* clean HTML structure
* caching preparation

The website should be tested on desktop and mobile.

## Multilingual system with AI-assisted translation

The freelancer must recommend and configure a professional multilingual solution that supports AI-assisted translation.

Possible solutions include:

* WPML with automatic translation
* TranslatePress with automatic translation
* Polylang with a suitable AI workflow
* another professional solution

The system should support:

* multiple languages
* translated pages, posts and menus
* translated reusable blocks
* translated SEO titles and descriptions
* translated image descriptions
* correct language URLs
* hreflang
* additional languages in the future
* AI-generated draft translations
* manual review and correction
* human approval before publication

Preferred workflow:

1. create or update the source-language page
2. generate a draft translation using AI
3. review and correct the translation
4. approve and publish it

The freelancer must explain:

* recommended multilingual tool
* AI translation provider
* expected ongoing costs
* where translations are stored
* whether translations remain editable
* how source-content changes are handled
* how SEO metadata is translated
* which external services receive content
* how GDPR requirements are considered

All licenses, accounts and translation credits must be owned by Seil-Frey GmbH.

## Yoast SEO

Install and configure Yoast SEO, including:

* titles and meta descriptions
* XML sitemap
* robots settings
* canonical URLs
* multilingual SEO compatibility
* breadcrumbs if used
* structured data basics
* noindex rules
* preservation of existing URLs where reasonable
* 301 redirects where URLs change

## GDPR and privacy

The website must be suitable for German and European data-protection requirements.

Important requirements:

* locally hosted fonts
* no external Google Fonts
* no Google Analytics
* no unnecessary tracking
* no unnecessary external connections
* privacy-friendly external content
* privacy-compliant contact forms
* documentation of external requests and services

## Handover

After completion, the framework will be handed over to an internal content editor.

The freelancer must provide:

* explanation of website structure
* explanation of Kadence and global design settings
* explanation of CSS classes
* explanation of reusable patterns
* instructions for creating pages
* instructions for images, galleries and tables
* instructions for translations and AI translation
* instructions for SEO metadata
* plugin and license list
* backup and update instructions
* documentation of all custom code

At least one recorded online training session must be included.

As part of final acceptance, the content editor should be able to create a page, use the prepared patterns and generate an AI-assisted translation.

Any usability problems found during this test must be corrected before acceptance.

## Development process

The work should be completed in a staging environment.

Suggested phases:

1. review the existing website
2. propose improved information architecture
3. create design concept
4. define global styles
5. set up child theme and CSS system
6. create header, navigation and footer
7. create reusable components
8. create sample pages
9. configure multilingual functionality
10. configure AI translation
11. configure Yoast SEO
12. optimize performance
13. test responsiveness
14. document and train
15. hand over the framework

## Ownership

All custom code, CSS, patterns, templates, designs and documentation become the property of Seil-Frey GmbH after payment.

All accounts and licenses must be registered to Seil-Frey GmbH.

The freelancer must not leave personal license keys, inaccessible accounts, hidden fees, undocumented code or permanent technical dependencies.

## Required experience

Please apply only if you have proven experience with:

* Kadence Theme and Kadence Blocks
* WordPress Gutenberg
* child themes
* custom CSS
* responsive WordPress development
* multilingual websites
* AI-assisted translation workflows
* Yoast SEO
* website migration
* performance optimization
* documentation and handover

General WordPress or Elementor experience alone is not sufficient.

## Application requirements

Please begin your application with:

**Kadence Gutenberg**

Please provide:

1. at least three live Kadence/Gutenberg websites
2. your exact contribution to each website
3. your approach to CSS architecture and reusable patterns
4. your multilingual experience
5. your recommended multilingual tool and AI workflow
6. expected ongoing translation costs
7. proposed project phases and duration
8. fixed-price proposal
9. separate price for optional content transfer
10. confirmation that you will personally perform the work
11. confirmation that documentation and training are included

Generic WordPress applications without specific Kadence references will not be considered.

## Initial paid test task

Before awarding the full project, we may commission a paid test task, including:

* Kadence Child Theme setup
* global colors and typography
* responsive header
* hero section
* reusable text-and-image section
* responsive table
* documentation of the CSS classes used

The quality and maintainability of this test task will be used to select the freelancer.

description:
## B2B Lead Generation Specialist Needed – 100,000 Verified Leads in Germany

We are looking for an experienced B2B Lead Generation and Company Research Specialist to build a high-quality database of approximately 100,000 verified business leads in Germany.

The project must be completed using professional lead generation platforms such as Dealfront or Cognism, combined with manual research and verification.

### Project Scope

The freelancer will:

* Identify relevant companies located in Germany
* Find the appropriate decision-makers and business contacts within each company
* Use Dealfront, Cognism, or comparable professional lead generation tools
* Manually review and verify the collected information
* Remove duplicate, incomplete, outdated, or irrelevant leads
* Organize all leads in a clean Excel or Google Sheets file

### Required Lead Information

Each lead should contain as much of the following information as possible:

* First name
* Last name
* Job title
* Department
* Company name
* Company website
* Industry
* Company size or number of employees
* City
* Postal code
* German federal state
* Business email address
* Direct business telephone number
* General company telephone number
* LinkedIn profile URL
* Company LinkedIn URL
* Source of the information

### Target Contacts

We are primarily interested in decision-makers, including:

* Company owners
* Founders and co-founders
* Managing directors
* CEOs
* CFOs
* HR directors
* Marketing directors
* CSR and sustainability managers
* Corporate communications managers
* Partnership managers
* Other senior decision-makers

### Quality Requirements

The database must meet the following requirements:

* Companies and contacts must be located in Germany
* Leads must be relevant to the agreed target group
* Email addresses should be professionally verified
* Telephone numbers should be checked whenever possible
* No duplicate contacts or companies
* No fake, automatically generated, or outdated information
* Consumer or private contact information should not be included
* Data must come from legitimate professional or publicly available business sources
* The work must follow applicable GDPR and data-protection requirements

We are not looking for a freelancer who simply exports a large unverified list from a database. Manual verification and quality control are essential parts of this project.

### Project Process

The project will be completed in stages.

The selected freelancer must first provide a test sample of 100 leads. We will review the sample for:

* Accuracy

description:
Located in Germany (native speaker is a plus)
# Development of a Digital Group Booking Process Using WordPress and Outlook

## 1. Project Objective

The objective of this project is to implement a structured digital workflow for group bookings through the climbing gym's existing WordPress website.

Groups should be able to submit a complete booking request through an online form. Each request will then be reviewed internally and either approved or declined by a staff member.

Only after manual approval should the system automatically create a booking in the gym's Microsoft Outlook calendar.

The solution should achieve the following objectives:

* Collect all relevant group information in a structured way.
* Reduce phone calls and email communication.
* Ensure an internal review before confirming any booking.
* Prevent double bookings and overbooking.
* Automatically create Outlook calendar entries for confirmed bookings.
* Maintain a complete record of all booking requests.
* Verify instructor qualifications and parental consent forms before the visit.
* Reduce administrative workload for reception and office staff.

---

# 2. Overall Process

The proposed workflow is:

**Group submits booking request through WordPress**

↓

**Booking request is stored**

↓

**Automatic confirmation of receipt is sent**

↓

**Internal review**

↓

**Manual approval or rejection**

↓

**Automatic creation or update of the Outlook calendar entry**

A booking only becomes binding after it has been manually approved by an authorized employee.

Submitting the online form represents a booking request only and does **not** reserve the requested date automatically.

---

# 3. Systems Involved

## WordPress

WordPress serves as the public interface for customers.

The website will be used to:

* collect all booking information
* request preferred dates and times
* upload instructor certificates
* display booking conditions and safety information
* provide or link parental consent forms
* send automatic confirmation emails

---

## WordPress Form Plugin

A professional form plugin is required to build the booking process.

Suitable options include:

* Gravity Forms
* Fluent Forms
* Formidable Forms
* WPForms

The selected plugin should support at least:

* required fields
* conditional logic
* file uploads
* automated emails
* GDPR consent
* multi-page forms
* unique booking reference numbers
* API or webhook integration
* data transfer to external systems

---

## Microsoft 365 / Power Automate

Microsoft Power Automate will connect WordPress with Microsoft 365 and automate the business workflow.

Typical tasks include:

* receiving booking data from WordPress
* storing requests in Microsoft Lists
* notifying the responsible staff members
* updating booking status
* creating Outlook calendar appointments after approval
* sending confirmations or rejection emails
* sending reminder emails
* checking calendar conflicts

Alternative automation platforms such as Make or Zapier could also be used, although Power Automate is the preferred option due to the existing Microsoft 365 environment.

---

## Microsoft Lists

Microsoft Lists will act as the internal booking database.

Every booking request should be stored together with its current processing status.

Suggested status values include:

* New Request
* Under Review
* Customer Follow-up Required
* Missing Documents
* Provisionally Reserved
* Confirmed
* Declined
* Cancelled
* Completed

---

## Microsoft Outlook

Outlook will serve as the official operational calendar for confirmed group bookings.

Unapproved booking requests should either:

* not appear in Outlook at all, or
* be shown as provisional internal reservations using a dedicated category.

The recommended approach is to create the final Outlook appointment only after manual approval.

---

## GymRealm

Since the climbing gym already uses GymRealm, the implementation should first determine whether confirmed group bookings also need to be synchronized with GymRealm.

The following questions should be clarified:

* Should GymRealm remain the primary booking system?
* Does GymRealm provide an API or integration interface?
* Can group bookings be imported automatically?
* Can GymRealm create Outlook calendar appointments?
* Should participant numbers and revenue be stored there?
* Does GymRealm already include capacity or resource management?

Duplicate manual data entry into both Outlook and GymRealm should be avoided whenever possible.

---

# 4. Online Group Booking Form

The booking form should be divided into several clear and user-friendly steps.

## Step 1 – Contact Information

Required fields:

* Organisation or group name
* Group type
* Responsible contact person
* Email address
* Telephone number
* Billing address (if required)
* Alternative contact person for the day of the visit

Suggested group categories:

* School
* Kindergarten
* Sports Club
* Youth Group
* Social Organisation
* Company
* Private Group
* Birthday Party
* Other

---

## Step 2 – Requested Booking

Required fields:

* Preferred date
* Preferred start time
* Planned duration
* Optional alternative date
* Requested activity
* Estimated arrival time

Available activities:

* Bouldering
* Rope Climbing
* Combination of Bouldering and Rope Climbing
* Instructor-led Session
* Self-supervised Group

The booking form should clearly state that the requested date is **not confirmed until reviewed and approved by the climbing gym**.

Ich plane eine App für ein Debian-basiertes Touchscreen-Terminal. Die Anwendung soll eine interaktive Steuerung ermöglichen und dabei hauptsächlich Textinformationen anzeigen. description:
Ich suche einen zuverlässigen Partner, der unsere Website langfristig und ganzheitlich nach aktuellen Google-Richtlinien optimiert. Mir sind drei Säulen besonders wichtig – technische SEO, Onpage-Optimierung und ein solider Offpage-Aufbau.

Technischer Schwerpunkt
• Indexierung: Vorrang hat das Beheben aller Indexierungsfehler sowie eine saubere Crawler-Steuerung, damit nur relevante Seiten erfasst werden.
• Core Web Vitals, Ladezeiten und weitere Performance-Themen dürfen gern mitgedacht werden, doch die Indexierungsqualität steht an erster Stelle.

Onpage-Aufgaben
• Optimieren von Meta-Titeln, Beschreibungen, Überschriften und interner Verlinkung.
• Bild-SEO, strukturierte Daten und Content-Anpassungen zur Steigerung der Relevanz.

Offpage-Aufgaben
• Analyse unseres bestehenden Backlinkprofils, anschließend gezielter Linkaufbau über thematisch passende Quellen und Branchenverzeichnisse.

Ergänzend erwarte ich:
• Einrichtung und Pflege des Google Business Profils für Local SEO.
• Monatliches Reporting mit klaren KPIs sowie einer nachvollziehbaren Dokumentation sämtlicher Maßnahmen.
• Kontinuierliche Beratung, um neu auftretende Chancen oder Google-Updates zeitnah zu berücksichtigen.

Bitte gib an, welche Tools du für Audits, Monitoring und Reporting einsetzt (z. B. Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, Search Console, Looker Studio). Idealerweise bringst du nachweisbare Erfolge aus ähnlichen Projekten mit. Ich freue mich auf dein Konzept zur Umsetzung und einen realistischen Zeitplan.

description:
Ich betreibe zwei WordPress-Seiten – eine im Avada-, die andere im Divi-Theme – und möchte sie schrittweise optimieren. Dafür suche ich jemanden, der mich stundenweise und flexibel unterstützt, sobald neue Aufgaben anstehen.

Kernaufgaben 
• Design-Anpassungen: Layouts überarbeiten, Farben und Schriften angleichen und bei Bedarf neue Bilder einfügen, damit beide Auftritte ein konsistentes Look-and-Feel erhalten. 
• SEO-Optimierung: Artikel mit Yoast optimieren, Meta-Daten nachpflegen und die interne Verlinkung verbessern, um die Sichtbarkeit in Suchmaschinen zu steigern. 
• Funktionsanpassungen: Performance-Tuning (Caching, Bildkomprimierung, Datenbank-Cleanup), damit die Seiten schneller laden und eine bessere Core-Web-Vitals-Bewertung erzielen.

So arbeiten wir zusammen 
– Du kennst WordPress, Avada, Divi, Yoast SEO und gängige Performance-Tools (z. B. WP Rocket, Autoptimize). 
– Sobald ich eine Aufgabe habe, beschreibe ich sie kurz; du schätzt den Zeitaufwand und legst los, nachdem ich freigegeben habe. 
– Kommunikation läuft bevorzugt per E-Mail oder Telefon, kleine Abstimmungen gern per Zoom. 
– Abrechnung erfolgt minutengenau auf Stundenbasis.

Wenn dir flexible Remote-Arbeit liegt und du Lust hast, meine Coach- und Trainer-Websites kontinuierlich zu verbessern, freue ich mich auf deine Nachricht mit kurzer Vorstellung und einem Hinweis auf vergleichbare Projekte sowie Deinem Stundensatz.

description:
I’m preparing the launch campaign for “One Retreat – Yoga & Sailing Week” in Corfu and need a cinematic brand piece that immediately transports viewers into the calm flow of sunrise yoga on deck, gentle Aegean breezes in the sails, and the slow-motion serenity of life at sea. The primary objective is to promote the retreat, so every second of screen time has to make people want to book their spot.

# Creative Brief – Cinematic Brand Video & Social Shorts
## One Retreat – Yoga & Sailing Week | Corfu, Greece

### Objective
Create an emotional, cinematic brand film that makes people feel what this retreat is like rather than simply showing what happens.

The video should inspire viewers to think:
"I want to be there."

The focus is on freedom, connection, nature, wellbeing and unforgettable moments aboard a luxury catamaran in the Ionian Islands.

---

# Deliverables

## 1. Hero Film
Length: 2–3 minutes

Format:
* YouTube
* Website Hero Video

---

## 2. Social Content

Create 15–25 short edits from the main footage.

Formats:
* Instagram Reels
* TikTok
* Facebook Reels
* YouTube Shorts
* Stories (9:16)
* Square versions where useful

Length:
10–45 seconds

---

# Overall Feeling

The film should feel like:

Luxury without being pretentious.

Natural.

Elegant.

Authentic.

Warm.

Human.

Peaceful.

Joyful.

Emotional.

Think:
White Lotus meets Patagonia meets luxury sailing documentary.

No staged influencer content.

Real emotions.

---

# Visual Style

Golden hour

Soft morning light

Crystal-clear turquoise water

Deep blue sea

Slow motion mixed with dynamic drone shots

Natural camera movement

Handheld close-ups

Beautiful cinematic color grading

Premium documentary style

---

# Main Story

This is not about a yoga retreat.

It is about a journey.

People arrive as strangers.

They leave as friends.

The sea becomes home.

Every day offers a new island, a new bay and a new experience.

---

# Characters

Small international group

Approximately six guests

Preferably mostly women

Age:
30–55

Mix of solo travellers and friends

Natural diversity

No models

Real people

---

# Emotions to Capture

Laughter

Big smiles

Deep conversations

Eye contact

Hugs

Friendship

Freedom

Excitement

Wonder

Calmness

Peace

Joy

Adventure

Connection

---

# Key Experiences

Luxury catamaran sailing

Exploring the Ionian Islands

Swimming in turquoise water

Jumping from the catamaran

Relaxing on the nets

Morning coffee on deck

Sunrise yoga

Meditation

Sound healing at sunset

Breathing exercises

Reading on deck

Sharing brunch together

Dinner in authentic Greek harbour restaurants

Walking through beautiful harbour villages

Discovering hidden beaches

SUP boarding

Snorkelling

Helping sail the catamaran

Learning basic sailing

Watching dolphins if available

Sunsets at sea

Starry nights

Morning swims

Laughing together

Cooking together where appropriate

Celebrating life

---

# Must-Have Shots

Drone flying around the catamaran

Catamaran sailing with full sails

Close-up of hands touching the water

Feet walking barefoot on deck

Wind in the hair

People laughing together

Friends hugging

Group enjoying dinner in a Greek harbour

Local seafood and Mediterranean dishes

Greek tavern atmosphere

Wine glasses clinking

Fresh fruit

Morning yoga on the front deck

Sound healing with crystal bowls

Meditation overlooking the sea

Woman jumping into the water

Swimming around the boat

Reading in a hammock/net

Anchor dropping

Beautiful anchorages

Small fishing villages

Harbour arrivals

Walking through white Greek streets

Sunset silhouettes

Night sky

Morning coffee

Captain steering

Ropes moving

Sails opening

Sea spray

Smiles

Authentic candid moments

---

# Locations

Corfu

Paxos

Antipaxos

Hidden bays

Small Greek harbours

Traditional tavernas

Crystal-clear beaches

Open sea

Luxury catamaran

---

# Brand Values

Freedom

Community

Adventure

Mindfulness

Luxury

Nature

Connection

Slow living

Authenticity

Transformation

Joy

---

# Music

Emotional cinematic soundtrack

Organic percussion

Soft piano

Ambient electronic elements

Mediterranean influences

Build slowly

Strong emotional climax

End with a peaceful feeling

---

# Editing Style

Slow emotional storytelling

Beautiful pacing

Mix of cinematic wide shots and intimate close-ups

Natural sound design

Ocean sounds

Wind

Laughter

Water splashes

Sound healing

No fast influencer-style editing

Premium Netflix documentary quality

---

# Brand Message

This is more than a holiday.

More than yoga.

More than sailing.

It is a week that reconnects people with nature, with others and with themselves.

---

# Call to Action

Escape the ordinary.

Join us in the Ionian Islands.

One Retreat.

Sail. Breathe. Connect

description:
Leistungsbeschreibung: Konzeption, editorielle Begleitung und Gestaltung einer wissenschaftlich-künstlerischen Publikation zur Geschichte der Graduiertenschule an der Universität der Künste Berlin (Berlin Centre for Advanced Studies in Arts and Sciences)

Gesucht wird ein Angebot für die konzeptionelle, editorielle und gestalterische Begleitung einer zweisprachigen Publikation (Deutsch/Englisch), die auf Interviewmaterial, Archivdokumenten und wissenschaftlich-künstlerischer Forschung basiert.

Projektziel
Entwicklung einer druckfertigen Publikation, die unterschiedliche Text- und Bildmaterialien zu einer kohärenten narrativen und gestalterischen Einheit zusammenführt. Die Publikation soll sowohl editoriell als auch gestalterisch entwickelt und bis zur Druckvorbereitung begleitet werden.

Leistungsumfang
1. Konzeption und editorielle Begleitung
•	Analyse und Sichtung des vorhandenen Materials 
•	Unterstützung bei der Strukturierung und Organisation der Inhalte 
•	Entwicklung einer inhaltlichen und narrativen Publikationsstruktur 
•	Redaktionelle Beratung während des Entwicklungsprozesses 
•	Regelmäßige Abstimmungstermine während der Projektlaufzeit 

2. Editorial Design
•	Entwicklung eines Gestaltungskonzepts 
•	Entwicklung eines Layout- und Gestaltungssystems 
•	Gestaltung von Umschlag und Innenteil 
•	Integration und Aufbereitung von Bild- und Archivmaterial 
•	Erstellung von Prototypen bzw. Layoutentwürfen 

3. Layout und Produktionsvorbereitung
•	Satz und Layout der vollständigen Publikation 
•	Überarbeitung bis zur Druckreife 
•	Erstellung druckfähiger Daten 
•	Unterstützung bei produktionstechnischen Entscheidungen 
•	Abstimmung mit der Druckerei (optional) 
Voraussichtlicher Projektablauf
•	Phase 1: Konzeption, Materialsichtung und Strukturentwicklung 
•	Phase 2: Gestaltungskonzept und Layoutentwicklung 
•	Phase 3: Finalisierung, Druckvorbereitung und Produktionsbegleitung 

Geplanter Zeitrahmen
Juli bis November 2026

Geplante Publikation
•	Format: ca. A5 
•	Umfang: ca. 180–240 Seiten 
•	Sprache: Deutsch/Englisch 
•	Auflage: ca. 250–350 Exemplare 
•	Druck: Fadenheftung, Softcover oder Hardcover (noch festzulegen) 

Nicht Bestandteil des Auftrags
•	Druckkosten 
•	Übersetzungen 
•	Externes Lektorat/Proofreading 
•	Erstellung neuer Illustrationen oder Fotografien 
•	Erwerb von Bildrechten 
•	Organisation einer öffentlichen Präsentation

description:
I have an N-registered, experimental, fixed-wing two-seater based in North-Rhine Westphalia, Germany, and it is time for the annual condition inspection required under 14 CFR §91.319(b). I need an FAA-certified inspector (A&P with IA, or DAR qualified to perform condition inspections) who can visit the aircraft on site, carry out the inspection in accordance with AC 43.13 and Appendix D of Part 43, and then make the proper logbook entries to return it to service.

A full narrative report is not necessary; the standard checklist and signed logbook entry will be sufficient for my records and for continuing airworthiness. All maintenance manuals, previous logbooks, and the equipment list will be available on the day.

Deliverables 
• Physical condition inspection completed on site 
• Logbook entry and FAA-compliant sign-off 

The airplane is hangared with good access to tools and power; please let me know your earliest availability and any equipment you would like me to have ready before you arrive.
